# SQLite Amalgamation

This directory vendors the SQLite amalgamation for DUUMBI-380.

- Version: 3.53.2
- Source archive: https://www.sqlite.org/2026/sqlite-amalgamation-3530200.zip
- Download date: 2026-06-06
- SHA3-256: `81142986038e18f96c4a54e1a72562ae17e502a916f2a7701eff43388cbf1a40`

SQLite is public domain software. The vendored `sqlite3.c` and `sqlite3.h`
files include the upstream public-domain blessing/disclaimer.
